'''Kuras''' was the [[Kuras system/Legends|Kuras system's]] primary [[Star/Legends|star]]. It was a white dwarf. The [[Star system/Legends|system's]] primary was given the name "Kuras" by the ancient [[Coynite/Legends|Coynite]] [[Species/Legends|species]], who placed the star in the [[Constellation/Legends|constellation]] of [[Kezz'Sreik'Kuras]].

{{Star-stub}}
